# Differential-oracle vectors: REAL chrony save_source/load_source dump format.
# Refclock refid 0x52454643; reach pattern 1,0,1 -> octal 5 size 3; stratum 3 leap 1.
# Consumer Rust (sources/registry.rs); NO Python.
SAVE line1=SRC0 line2=. line3=0 5 3 3 1
LOAD reach=5 stratum=3 leap=1
SSTBODY |6 0\n2000000000.000000000 -1.000000e-03 -1.000000e-03 1.000000e-03 1.000000e-06 1.000000e-03 1.000000e-06\n2000000064.000000000 -1.000000e-03 -1.000000e-03 1.000000e-03 1.000000e-06 1.000000e-03 1.000000e-06\n2000000128.000000000 -1.000000e-03 -1.000000e-03 1.000000e-03 1.000000e-06 1.000000e-03 1.000000e-06\n2000000192.000000000 -1.000000e-03 -1.000000e-03 1.000000e-03 1.000000e-06 1.000000e-03 1.000000e-06\n2000000256.000000000 -1.000000e-03 -1.000000e-03 1.000000e-03 1.000000e-06 1.000000e-03 1.000000e-06\n2000000320.000000000 -1.000000e-03 -1.000000e-03 1.000000e-03 1.000000e-06 1.000000e-03 1.000000e-06\n|
